roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: JURY TRIAL- VERDICT/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: NOT GUILTY ON COUNTS 1 & 2/X: COURT GRANTS DEFENSE' ORAL MOTION FOR A HELMANDOLLARRELIEF AT THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES,/X: THIS MATTER CAME BEFORE THE COURT ON A JURY TRIAL AND THE JURY, HAVING REVIEWED THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, FOUND THAT THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUSTAIN A CONVICTION ON SAID FACTS, AND THEREFORE MADE A FACTUAL FINDINGTHAT MR, AKCAOGLU IS NOT GUILTY OF DRIVING UNDER THE INFLUENCE PURSUANT TO VC 23152(A) & 23152(B)/
